description_long: This object consists of three wooden barrels grouped together on a flat, square platform. Each barrel is constructed from vertical wooden staves, bound by two prominent metallic hoops—one near the top and one near the bottom. The wood displays a natural, slightly weathered texture with visible grain and some minor imperfections, giving the barrels an authentic, rustic appearance. The tops of the barrels are open, revealing a hollow interior, and the metallic hoops have a slightly worn, matte finish. There are no visible handles, lids, or markings on the barrels, and the grouping suggests they are intended for storage or decorative use in an urban environment. The barrels are of medium size, suitable for placement in streets, parks, or near storefronts.
description: A group of three medium-sized, open-topped wooden barrels with metal hoops, arranged on a square platform. The barrels have a rustic, weathered look and no visible handles or markings.
description_view_0: Three wooden barrels grouped closely, with the front barrel showing a small knot and clear metal hoops.
description_view_1: The barrels are seen from a slight angle, revealing more of the leftmost barrel's side and the open tops.
description_view_2: The barrels are viewed from the back, with the central barrel most prominent and all tops visible.
description_view_3: The barrels are seen from the right, highlighting the curvature and the metallic hoops on each barrel.
